### Comment
> Subject:

> 
> Message:
> 
> Hello AdGuard Team,
> 
> Our domain https://naitam.com is currently classified as a dangerous/phishing website by AdGuard DNS.
> 
> We believe this is a false positive.
> 
> The previous version of this website had been inactive for several years and may have been compromised in the past while hosted on a different shared hosting provider.
> 
> The website has now been completely rebuilt from scratch and migrated to a new hosting environment. No old source code, configuration files, or database from the previous website has been reused.
> 
> We have also verified the current website using several independent security services:
> 
> - Google Safe Browsing: No unsafe content found
> - VirusTotal: 0 security vendors detected any threat
> - Sucuri SiteCheck: No malware found, not blacklisted

> 
> The current website is clean and does not contain phishing pages, malware, malicious scripts, or redirects.
> 
> We kindly request that you review the current status of the domain and remove it from the AdGuard DNS phishing/malicious database if appropriate.
> 
> Screenshots of the security scan results are attached.
> 
> Thank you for your time and assistance.

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://packsmc.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fpacksmc.com%2F)

### Comment
> packsmc.com and its subdomains (www.packsmc.com, dedicated.packsmc.com) are incorrectly blocked by the AdGuard DNS Default server - all three currently resolve to the sinkhole 94.140.14.33 (verified 2026-07-03; unfiltered 94.140.14.140 and other resolvers return the real Cloudflare IPs).
> 
> The site is a legitimate Minecraft texture/resource-pack platform (free downloads, in-browser preview/designer, version converter). The block appears to originate from a false malware IOC filed on ThreatFox (abuse.ch) around 2026-07-01 as part of a harassment campaign against the site. abuse.ch reviewed and hard-deleted that IOC - it is absent from the full historical export at threatfox.abuse.ch/export/. Reference points: URLhaus, OpenPhish, PhishTank and SURBL have never listed the domain; Google Safe Browsing, Kaspersky OpenTIP, McAfee (Games, Minimal Risk) and Trend Micro are clean.
> 
> Please remove packsmc.com (and subdomains) from the AdGuard DNS security block list as a false positive. Thank you!



### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/78utmaqz6j8c40kokw0o8cokosksc0c2av671u9fgw.png?nc=1)

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)

### Comment
> packsmc.com and its subdomains (www.packsmc.com, dedicated.packsmc.com) are incorrectly blocked by the AdGuard DNS Default server - all three currently resolve to the sinkhole 94.140.14.33 (verified 2026-07-03; unfiltered 94.140.14.140 and other resolvers return the real Cloudflare IPs).
> 
> The site is a legitimate Minecraft texture/resource-pack platform (free downloads, in-browser preview/designer, version converter). The block appears to originate from a false malware IOC filed on ThreatFox (abuse.ch) around 2026-07-01 as part of a harassment campaign against the site. abuse.ch reviewed and hard-deleted that IOC - it is absent from the full historical export at threatfox.abuse.ch/export/. Reference points: URLhaus, OpenPhish, PhishTank and SURBL have never listed the domain; Google Safe Browsing, Kaspersky OpenTIP, McAfee (Games, Minimal Risk) and Trend Micro are clean.
> 
> Please remove packsmc.com (and subdomains) from the AdGuard DNS security block list as a false positive. Thank you!
